title: cornutia longifolia
intro: Cornutia longifolia, also known as the long-leaved cornutia, is a plant species native to the tropical regions of Central and South America, belonging to the family Lamiaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Cornutia longifolia include relief from digestive issues, fever reduction, and wound healing, making it a valuable resource in traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, allowing for various applications in treating various health conditions.
